subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Branch hath represented: "Thou desirest to proceed to Beirut." Mírzá Ja'far saith that the intention is towards the farm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: غصن اعظم معروض داشت اراده بیروت دارید میرزا جعفر میگوید اراده مزرعه در سر است
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @poems and quotation from poetry, @unity of thought and belief
